title: Rubus colemannii microgene beckii
taxonomy: Rubus colemannii microgene beckii is classified as a subspecies of the species Rubus colemannii. As a subspecies, it is further categorized under the genus Rubus, which belongs to the family Rosaceae. The family Rosaceae includes a wide range of flowering plants commonly known as roses and their relatives. Rubus colemannii microgene beckii is a specific variant within the larger species Rubus colemannii. Its classification is based on the unique characteristics and genetic variations within the plant.
